title: Pearl of Patience
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:PearlofPatience-Ewoks.png|thumb|right|Wicket seeing the Pearl of Patience shown by Princess Kneesaa.]]

The '''Pearl of Patience''' was a pink gem offered by [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka/Legends|Kneesaa]] for [[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket]], in return of his loyalty to "Princess" [[Latara/Legends|Latara]].

Latara believed that a princess' life was too easy. So, Kneesaa allowed her the title of Princess for only one day, in order to show her how hard it was to be a real princess.

==Appearances==
*{{Ewoks|Princess Latara}} {{1st}}
